_note: BASE_AGENTID_REGISTRAR is the proxy address used for all on-chain write calls (registerHandle, reserveHandles, releaseHandle). BASE_ERC8004_REGISTRY is the underlying registry/implementation address for ERC-8004 metadata reads — it is not callable for writes.

base-mainnet._status: erc8004Registry live on Base mainnet. BASE_AGENTID_REGISTRAR (proxy for writes) pending — set before enabling ONCHAIN_MINTING_ENABLED=true on mainnet.

base-sepolia._status: Fully deployed and operational on Base Sepolia testnet.
